title: lupulus humulus
intro: Lupulus humulus, also known as the hop plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to temperate floras of Europe, Western Asia, and North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of hop plant extracts include reduced anxiety and stress levels, improved sleep quality, and relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Lupulus humulus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in the brewing industry to flavor and stabilize beer.
